title: CapabilityGrant
description: Least-privilege capability grant attached to a sub-agent for a specific task. The runtime denies-by-default and only honors actions whose required capability is in this grant. See conclave-spec.md §4.

expiresAt.description: Optional grant expiry. After this time the runtime refuses the capability without a re-grant.

grantedBy.description: Typically 'planner' for ratified plans; 'principal' for ad-hoc elevation.

capabilityToken.description: A capability token of the form 'verb:resource[:scope]'. Examples: read:repo, write:repo:branch, run:tests, run:build, run:lint, read:web, comment:pr, deploy:staging, deploy:prod, db:read, db:write, fs:write:sandbox, secrets:read.
